_meta.purpose: Category page hero text, SEO descriptions, and filter metadata

categories.title: Futon Frames
categories.heroText: Solid Hardwood Futon Frames — Sofa by Day, Bed by Night
categories.description: Discover our collection of premium futon frames crafted from solid hardwood. Night & Day Furniture's MoonGlider operating system makes converting from sofa to bed effortless. Available in Full and Queen sizes with multiple finish options including Cherry, Black Walnut, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.
categories.seoTitle: Futon Frames | Solid Wood Futon Sofas | Carolina Futons
categories.seoDescription: Shop solid hardwood futon frames from Night & Day Furniture. MoonGlider system for easy sofa-to-bed conversion. Full & Queen sizes. Free shipping over $1,999.

categories.title: Wall Hugger Futon Frames
categories.heroText: Space-Saving Wall Hugger Futons — No Need to Move Away From the Wall
categories.description: Our wall hugger futon frames convert from sofa to bed without moving away from the wall. Strata Furniture's patented zero-tolerance mechanism and Night & Day's wall-hugging designs are perfect for small spaces, apartments, and rooms where every inch counts.
categories.seoTitle: Wall Hugger Futon Frames | Space-Saving Futons | Carolina Futons
categories.seoDescription: Wall hugger futon frames that convert without moving from the wall. Strata Furniture & Night & Day designs. Perfect for small spaces. Shop now.

categories.title: Front-Loading & Nesting Futon Frames
categories.heroText: Front-Loading Nesting Futon Frames — Classic Three-Position Design
categories.description: Front-loading nesting futon frames feature a classic three-position design: sofa, reclined, and bed. The nesting body style offers a traditional futon experience with easy front-access conversion.
categories.seoTitle: Front-Loading Nesting Futon Frames | Carolina Futons
categories.seoDescription: Front-loading nesting futon frames with 3 positions. Brushed Driftwood & Skye finishes. Full & Queen sizes available.

categories.title: Platform Beds
categories.heroText: Solid Wood Platform Beds — No Box Spring Needed
categories.description: Our platform beds provide a clean, modern sleeping solution with built-in slat support — no box spring or foundation needed. Choose from Night & Day Furniture's Spices collection in multiple finishes, or KD Frames' American-made unfinished Tulip Poplar that you can customize. Available in Twin through King sizes with up to 600 lb weight capacity.
categories.seoTitle: Platform Beds | Solid Wood Beds | No Box Spring | Carolina Futons
categories.seoDescription: Solid wood platform beds — no box spring needed. Night & Day Spices collection & KD Frames USA-made beds. Twin to King. 600 lb capacity. Free shipping over $1,999.

categories.title: Murphy Cabinet Beds
categories.heroText: Murphy Cabinet Beds — From Cabinet to Queen Bed in Under 60 Seconds
categories.description: Transform any room into a guest bedroom with our Murphy cabinet beds. No wall mounting required — these freestanding cabinets convert to a full-size bed in under a minute. All models include a gel-infused memory foam mattress. Premium models feature built-in power/USB outlets, flip-up side trays, and rolling storage drawers.
categories.seoTitle: Murphy Cabinet Beds | Space-Saving Guest Beds | Carolina Futons
categories.seoDescription: Murphy cabinet beds — freestanding, no wall mount needed. Converts to bed in 60 seconds. Mattress included. Night & Day Furniture. Starting at $1,399.

categories.title: Futon Mattresses
categories.heroText: Premium Futon Mattresses — Handcrafted for Comfort That Lasts
categories.description: Our Otis Bed futon mattresses are handcrafted in the USA with premium foams and proprietary Compression Lace Tufting for 10-12+ years of everyday comfort. From the plush Moonshadow to the firm Mesa 3000, find your perfect comfort level. Arizona boutique mattresses available exclusively in our Hendersonville showroom.
categories.seoTitle: Futon Mattresses | Otis Bed | Premium Foam | Carolina Futons
categories.seoDescription: Handcrafted Otis Bed futon mattresses — TRUE 8" thick, 10-12+ year durability. Foam, innerspring & memory foam options. Full & Queen sizes. Shop or visit our showroom.
categories.note: Several mattresses are in-store only (contact for pricing)

categories.title: Bedroom Furniture & Accessories
categories.heroText: Dressers, Chests, Nightstands & Accessories to Complete Your Room
categories.description: Complete your bedroom with our curated collection of Night & Day Furniture casegoods. The Clove and Secrets collections feature dovetailed drawers, hand-rubbed finishes, and hidden storage. Plus platform bed accessories like storage drawers, trundle beds, and mattress protectors.
categories.seoTitle: Bedroom Furniture | Dressers, Chests, Nightstands | Carolina Futons
categories.seoDescription: Night & Day Furniture dressers, chests, nightstands. Clove & Secrets collections. Dovetail construction, multiple finishes. Platform bed accessories.
